channel.title: sejarah on bellabeen
channel.description: Recent content in sejarah on bellabeen

item.title: [history] Bubat War, Fire Triggering Java vs Sunda Sentiment
item.description: Bubat War, Fire Triggering Java vs Sunda Sentiment Have you ever heard of this myth: Javanese are forbidden to marry Sundanese? Did you know, before 2010, there were no street names Pajajaran & Siliwangi in Surabaya and no name of Gajah Mada & Hayam Wuruk in Bandung? Apparently this was triggered by a phenomenal war between the Majapahit Kingdom of East Java and the Pajajaran Kingdom from West Java called the Bubat war.
